positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic cosmic animal blend, featuring elements of a winged saber-toothed feline and a nebula cloud creature. The creature should be depicted in a dynamic, flowing pose, surrounded by abstract constellations and ethereal, glowing stardust trails. Use a deep midnight blue and vibrant magenta color palette, contrasted sharply with metallic gold outlines and accents. The style should be highly detailed vector art with strong graphic contrast, reminiscent of modern tattoo flash or Japanese woodblock printing, perfectly centered and cropped for apparel. Clean silhouettes are paramount.
negative: blurry, messy, noise, text, watermark, artifacts, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealistic, logo, signature, trademark, copyright, cartoon, graffiti, messy background
